summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AskBase application - natural language to MongoDB query system. All backend APIs working correctly with 100% success rate. Frontend UI loads properly with glassmorphism theme. LLM integration with OpenAI GPT-4o functioning correctly. Query processing, result display, and database operations all working as expected.

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay occasionally intercepts click events on send button
ui_bugs.workaround: Force click works, or user can press Enter key

passed_tests: All 7 backend API endpoints (GET /api/, GET /api/schema, POST /api/seed, POST /api/query, GET /api/history, DELETE /api/history, GET /api/stats)
Schema sidebar with expandable collections and field details
Query processing with LLM integration (OpenAI GPT-4o)
Results table display with proper formatting
Query preview showing generated MongoDB queries
Real-time query execution with loading indicators
